title: April Showers (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)
content:
The leaves are fresh after the rain,
            The air is cool and clear,
        The sun is shining warm again,
            The sparrows hopping in the lane
        Are brisk and full of cheer.

        And that is why we dance and play,
            And that is why we sing,
        Calling out in voices gay,
            We will not go to school to-day
        Or learn anything:

        It is a happy thing, I say,
        To be alive on such a day.
meaning:
James Stephens's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "April Showers (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
